testcase.name: test_03_get_user_photos_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: image_url appears truncated: 121 chars assert 121 > 200 + where 121 = len('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==...')

testcase.failure: tests/test_minting_photo_display_iteration56.py:95: in test_03_get_user_photos_endpoint assert len(image_url) > 200, f"image_url appears truncated: {len(image_url)} chars" E AssertionError: image_url appears truncated: 121 chars E assert 121 > 200 E + where 121 = len('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==...')

testcase.name: test_04_photo_minting_upload_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: BL coins not deducted correctly: 34505 -> 33505 assert 33505 == (34505 - 500)

testcase.failure: tests/test_minting_photo_display_iteration56.py:161: in test_04_photo_minting_upload_flow assert final_coins == initial_coins - 500, f"BL coins not deducted correctly: {initial_coins} -> {final_coins}" E AssertionError: BL coins not deducted correctly: 34505 -> 33505 E assert 33505 == (34505 - 500)
